pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 136: doc.save() creates file at this path; line 156 opens it in LibreOffice
task.json task description line 5, verifier.py line 38, export_result.sh line 12 all reference this path
task.json description specifies 5 sections; verifier.py line 78 checks 'if num_sections == 5'; sections are: Title Page, Executive Summary & Body, Appendix A, Appendix B, Appendix C
task.json description explicitly specifies orientations for each section; verifier.py line 87 checks expected_orientations matches this exact pattern
task.json description specifies Section 2 header as 'ABC Engineering Associates — CONFIDENTIAL'; verifier.py lines 139-140 check for both substrings
task.json description specifies Section 3 header as 'Appendix A — Floor Plans & Deficiency Matrix'; verifier.py lines 145-146 check for substring
task.json description specifies Section 4 header as 'Appendix B — Cost Estimates'; verifier.py lines 151-152 check for substring
task.json description specifies Section 5 header as 'Appendix C — Certifications & Qualifications'; verifier.py lines 157-158 check for substring
task.json description specifies Section 1 (Title Page) has 'No Header'; verifier.py lines 131-134 check header is empty or contains less than 5 characters

privileged_info_summary: The task restructures a synthetic inspection report document from a single continuous section into 5 distinct sections with alternating orientations (portrait, portrait, landscape, landscape, portrait). The source file is generated at /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report.docx and output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report_formatted.docx. The document contains specific headers for each section: Section 1 has no header, Section 2 contains 'ABC Engineering' and 'CONFIDENTIAL', Sections 3-5 contain 'Appendix A', 'Appendix B', and 'Appendix C' respectively. Content includes property inspection details, deficiency matrices, cost estimates, and engineer certifications with specific phrases like 'Meridian Capital', 'EPDM membrane', 'cost estimates', and 'James R. Thornton' that must be preserved.
